completion_summary: Validated bounded single-liquid batch, semibatch, and CSTR reference slices with material and energy ledgers, idempotent operations, failure diagnostics, analytical closures, and multiple steady-state evidence; unsupported full-platform physics remains explicitly lite.
notes: P1 bounded reactor slices are reference validated; complete multiphase reactor-platform promotion is not claimed.
scope: Upgrade shared batch, semibatch, and CSTR models with balances, thermal boundaries, failures, and reference closures
